title: Walkthrough: Falls Risk Screening Results in Able Assess

seo.title: Walkthrough: Falls Risk Screening Results in Able Assess | Able Care
seo.description: See how Able Assess presents falls risk screening results — clearly flagging patients who are at risk, and reassuring those who are not — to support timely decisions.

blocks.headline: Falls Risk Screening Results in Able Assess
blocks.subtitle: Clear, objective outcomes the moment screening ends. At risk or not at risk, every result is communicated in seconds.
blocks.backgroundImageAlt: Therapist reviewing Able Assess results with a patient on a tablet

blocks.heading: Results that drive timely decisions
blocks.body:
These videos showcase the results screen that appears after completing all four falls risk assessments in Able Assess:

  • Single Maximum Grip Strength
  • Timed Up & Go Test
  • Gait Speed
  • Chair Stand Test

One video highlights a patient flagged as at risk, while the other shows a patient assessed as not at risk — demonstrating how the platform clearly communicates outcomes to support timely decision-making.

blocks.heading: See Able Assess in your workflow.
blocks.bodyText: A 20-minute demo with a clinician who has run it in the field.
